form.formComment: Racing in great heart. Last start a big 8.2m win as favourite at this track beating Leonce Du Clos in 5-6yo gelding euro open on February 27 at $2.50. Has another win in his sights.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5.6m finishing fourth behind Kap Orne at this track over 2700m in a 6yo race on February 6 at $31. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Kabala Quick at Caen over 2450m in a 6-7yo race on March 30 at $17. Rates highly. Big chance.
